password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters.
login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login_failed_with_error: Login failed. Please try again later.
session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
session_validation_failed: Session validation failed. Please log in again.
login_description: Sign in to your Zsolt's CRM account
forgot_password_description: Enter the email address you use to sign in. We'll send a link to reset your password.
forgot_password_submitted: If an account exists for that email, a password-reset link has been sent.
forgot_password_check_inbox: Check your inbox — the link expires in 15 minutes.
reset_password_title: Set a new password - Zsolt's CRM
reset_password_description: Choose a new password to regain access to your account.
reset_password_success: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
reset_password_invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
set_password_description: An administrator has created a Zsolt's CRM account for you. Choose a password to get started.
set_password_success: Password set — you can now sign in.
set_password_invalid_token: This invite link is invalid or has expired. Please ask your administrator to send a new one.
